name: Refrigerated Grape Spread (Reduced-sugar)
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 3 half-pints
1. In a saucepan, soften the gelatin in the grape and lemon juices.
2. Bring to a full rolling boil to dissolve gelatin.
3. Boil for 1 minute and remove from heat.
4. Stir in sweetener.
5. Fill jars quickly, leaving 1/4-inch headspace.
6. Adjust lids.
7. Do not process or freeze.
8. Store in refrigerator and use within 4 weeks.
